title: Fresh, Juicy Dutch Chicken Pancakes
description: A comforting, keto-friendly Dutch dish made with pressure-cooked chicken, served on top of fluffy rice flour pancakes.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together rice flour, eggs, almond milk, and melted butter. Let the mixture rest for 10 minutes.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
In a separate pot, pressure-cook the chicken breast with chicken broth, salt, and black pepper for 10-12 minutes.
Shred the cooked chicken with two forks and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together grated ginger and garlic. Add the mixture to the shredded chicken and toss to coat.
To assemble the pancakes, place a cooked pancake on a plate, top with shredded chicken, and garnish with chopped parsley.
